name: Dino Genesis
short_description: Dino Genesis is an action FPS that navigates you through the forgotten island, ISLA GENESIS. You will have to defend yourself from genetically created Dinosaurs, Arachnids and Insects while discovering the dark secrets of the island.
detailed_description:
Dino Genesis is a passion project by one developer to create an awesome dinosaur FPS.

The biggest inspiration for creating this game was trying to make something like the Jurassic Park Arcade games, Jurassic The Hunted and especially Trespasser (1998). As a solo developer and game enthusiast my aim is to discover what makes these games so timeless and repayable.

DINO GENESIS will take you on a journey to the forgotten Island known as ISLA GENESIS.

The site of horrible genetic experiments and the disaster of 1995...

What will you do?

Dino Genesis is an action First Person Shooter where you navigate your way through the island finding weapons, shooting dinosaurs and other genetically created creatures, and try to keep yourself alive.

The Story of Dino Genesis has an expected playtime of 2-3 hours from start to finish

The game features indoor and outdoor environments as you navigate through the story.

Discover new species

As you play through the game, you will discover new species of Dinosaurs, Arachnids and Insects that want nothing more than to stop you from getting off the island.

There's something not right about this place...

The scientists who worked at ISLA GENESIS were corrupted by greed and power. Discover their story by finding cassette tapes scattered throughout the island. Each tape reveals more about the dark things that went on here.

Key Features

  • Immersive Story and Environments

  • Powerful Enemies to Enhance Difficulty

  • Multiple Weapons (Pistol, Assault Rifle, Sniper, Shotgun)

  • Island full of Dinosaurs, Giant Insects and Monster Spiders
